<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk002.pdf#page=15 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p78 -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->


[[File:Band06_chunk002_p015_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p015_img002.jpg|thumb|20 Musik 19 Jungfräulichkeit]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p015_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p015_img004.jpg|thumb|1 und 20 Musik, 2–8, 13–20 Tugenden des hl. Korbinian, 9–12 Eigenschaften des Lammes]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p79 -->
